titleStmt.title: SII 36.43: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 43. (A.R. No. 43 of 1910.) TIRUKKAḶĀVŪR (Tirukkarugāvūr), PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Madhuvanēśvara temple.

summary.p: The authorities of the temple (tirukkōyiluḍaiyārkaḷ), Panmāhēśvaras, Chōḻavēḷār and Teṉṉavaṉ Chōḻiyavaraiyar provided a list of several pieces of land and money granted earlier by different persons to the temple of Tirukkarugāvūr, situated near Tirukkuḍamūkkil, (Kumbakōṇam), a dēvadāna of Vaḍakarai Pāmbūr-nāḍu. These grants were received in the temple treasury for food offerings and for maintaining perpetual lamps.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī matiraikoṇṭa koparakesari
vanmarku yāṇṭu 10 8 Āvatu vaṭakarai pām
pūr nāṭṭu tevatāṉa tirukkuṭamūkkippāṟ karukā
vūr mahādevar paṇṭārattu nāṅkaḷ Ivāṇṭukku kīḻ
k koṇṭa pāṭakattāl poṉṉālum Opaḷḷi
t taḷikaiyālum poṉṉālum maṟṟum Eppaṭip
paṭṭatum paṇṭārattu koṇṭatu māna tirukkoyiluṭai
yārkaḷum panmāheśvararu(ma)ñ coḻaveḷārum teṉ
ṉavaṉ coḻiyavaraiyarum Iruntu kaṇakku kaṇṭu
kaṭavomāṉa poṉ 7 10 Eḻupatiṉ kaḻaiñcukkum I
kakku ttakilum Ivāṇṭaikku kīḻiṟai
Iṟuttu vārā niṉṟa nilam marutaṉ Omudan tiruvami
rtiṉukkum Oru tiruviḷakkiṉukkumāka vaitta nilan
ōṭait toṭṭattu 2mā Iraṇṭu māvum kovaraiṅ kāṇi
yum kuḷattiṉ kīḻai kāṇiyumāka nilam � Araikkā
lum cemaṅkuṭāṉ kāṭaṉ Āyiravaṉ Iru nontā
viḷakkiṉukku vaitta nilam kuṇṭuvaṭukiyiṉ melaivāy Irumā
k kāṇiyum Ālattūr vākkāliṉ kiḻa vākkāli mukkāṇiyummā
ka nilam � Araikkālum cāmuṇṭaṉ mūrtti Oru nontāviḷakkiṉu
ku vaitta nilam miyūr Uṭpalāṟṟiṉ vaṭavā Orumā mukkāṇi Oru mā mukkāṇi
Ālattūr vākkāliṉ kīḻaḻāl mukkāṇi mukkāṇiyumāka nilam �
Araikkālum Ālañceri tiṭaliṉ teṉvā Orumāvaraiyum Ita
ṉ vaṭavātiṭalum mokuliya cāttaṉ vaṭukaṉ neyāṭa vaitta
nilam mukkāṇi mukkāṇiyum koṅkamparenmukan paka
mukkāṇi mukkāṇiyum māka (stops here)—
Digital edition of SII 36.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
